Please close this pr, as playd.pl is now deprecated....
playd (playd.sh) can do everything playd.pl can and even more
Atm I don't plan to develop playd.pl any further, so it could as well
be deleted from ports tree since original playd (playd.sh) is much
much better now, and playd.pl still have some bugs

- -- 
Aldis Berjoza
